meta.title: Alexander Safronov — Front-end Developer
meta.description: Front-end Developer with 3+ years of commercial experience. Landing pages, e-commerce, and corporate sites with HTML/CSS/JS, React, WordPress. 20 live products shipped on Vercel.

hero.leadBefore: 3+ years of commercial experience — building landing pages, e-commerce platforms and corporate sites with
hero.leadAfter: . Currently shipping 20 live products in production.

projects.lead: {count} production apps deployed on Vercel — full-stack Next.js with PostgreSQL, Prisma, and modern PWA capabilities.

myitems.description: Personal household inventory PWA with photos, locations and search. Auth.js, Cloudinary, multilingual (en/uk/ru).

myfilms.description: Movie recommendation PWA — share film lists with friends, rate and discover.

uptolife.description: Gamified yearly progress planner. Goals, habits, XP — built with next-intl.

wishlist.description: Mobile web app for wishlists and Secret Santa rooms with reservations and comments.

homepay.description: Track meter readings and home utility payments with monthly reports.

mycash.description: Track income, expenses and savings with rich category breakdowns.

mysmak.description: Track and rate everything you've tasted. Photos, notes, ratings — all in a PWA.

pdfreduct.description: PWA PDF editor with merge, split and compress. Storage on Vercel Blob.

magaz7km.description: Online store with product catalog, cart and checkout flow.

timergame.description: Fast-paced timer-based reaction game playable in the browser.

rashod.description: Track shared expenses and split them between people with ease.

clue.description: Personal directory of useful resources: wholesale suppliers, services, bookmarks. Categorized with fast search.

task-tracker.description: Lightweight task management with categories, deadlines and priorities.

arendapro.description: Simple PWA for landlords to track properties, income, utilities and inventory. Auth.js + Prisma, mobile-first.

gotrack.description: PWA for trips: distance, fuel, and the cost of every kilometer. Fast, clean, installable.

lexiflow.description: PWA for learning English: spaced repetition, AI tutor, gamified progress.

happypaws.description: PWA for pet owners: feeding schedules, portions, and reminders via web push. Next.js 15, Prisma, i18n.

crmpro.description: CRM with leads, deals, contacts and pipeline management.

adtrack.description: Analytics for ad creatives: spend, CTR, CPM, ROAS per campaign. A decision engine tells you what to cut and what to scale.

experience.lead: Front-end Developer comfortable working in cross-functional teams, integrating third-party APIs and delivering projects end-to-end — from layout to production.

bullets: Developed landing pages and pre-landing pages for affiliate marketing campaigns — responsive, cross-browser, pixel-perfect from Figma/PSD.
Integrated custom designs into WordPress: sliced layouts into WP themes and page templates from scratch.
Built a Telegram bot to automate routine team tasks and streamline internal workflows, reducing manual operations.
Performed ongoing maintenance: bug fixing, performance improvements, and cross-browser compatibility.
Built a full-featured online store integrated with a CRM system for automated order management.
Configured API integrations with CRM, Google Sheets, and Keitaro — reduced order processing and tracking time.
Developed multiple landing pages for product sales campaigns, meeting deadlines and client requirements.
Created a training website with a quiz/test module for onboarding new call center employees.
Delivered a WooCommerce store for a partner company, enabling a new sales channel.
Implemented a corporate multilingual website on React with an admin panel supporting CRUD operations for service cards, rendered via API.
Developed the front-end for a large multi-page e-commerce platform and several single-page sites.
Implemented responsive layouts and UI components: forms, modals, carousels, navigation menus.
Integrated Google Maps API for location-based features.

education.uniProgram: System Engineering · Automation & Computer-Integrated Technologies · Intelligent Computer Control Systems
education.hillel: Hillel IT School — Front End Pro

about.lead: I'm Alexander — Front-end Developer with 3+ years of commercial experience. I build landing pages, e-commerce and corporate sites. On the side I ship 14 of my own products on Vercel: full-stack Next.js with Prisma and PostgreSQL.

ship.title: Ship fast
ship.body: I build with proven tools — React, Next.js, Tailwind, WordPress — and skip the bikeshed. Production beats perfection.

fullstack.title: End-to-end delivery
fullstack.body: Pixel-perfect markup from Figma, API integrations (CRM, Google Sheets, Keitaro), deploy and maintenance. I own projects from layout to production.

clean.title: Clean code
clean.body: ES6+, SASS, component-based architecture. Code that's easy to read, maintain and hand off to a team.

details.title: Detail obsessed
details.body: Cross-browser compatibility, performance, mobile responsiveness, edge cases. The polish is the product.

contact.lead: Whether it's a polished MVP, a side-project you want shipped, or a complex full-stack app — I'm down to talk.
